heading: Return Policy
sub: We know that finding the right size and filter strength takes some trial. If it's not perfect, we'll make it right.
importantText: Returns must be initiated within 30 days of your original purchase date.
step1Desc: Email or call us to let us know you'd like to return your order. We'll send you an RMA (Return Merchandise Authorization) number.
step2Desc: Include the original product, your RMA number, and your original receipt or online invoice with the purchase date circled. Add a short note explaining the reason for the return.
step3Desc: Ship the package to us. Once we receive and inspect it, we'll process your refund, exchange, or replacement — whichever you prefer.
includeTitle: What to include in your package
include2: RMA number (provided by us after you make contact)
include3: Original receipt or online invoice — circle the purchase date
include4: Written explanation of your return reason
noReceiptNote: Don't have your receipt? No problem — we can look up your purchase details if needed.
ctaSub: Start your return or ask any question — we're here Monday to Friday, 9:00–17:00.
